title: Share Handmade Kindness Challenge
excerpt: Absolutely love this new movement and challenge that Jennifer McGuire is putting out for the month of November. Watch her video , and then you can also watch mine . Hope you're inspired to take on the challenge as well!
body: Absolutely love this new movement and challenge that Jennifer McGuire is putting out for the month of November. Watch her video, and then you can also watch mine. Hope you're inspired to take on the challenge as well!
